samples.dialogLead: Fetch community starter settings from the following URL.
samples.dialogBody: This downloads display names, URL patterns, optional taught selectors/fingerprints, and sample letter-badge icons (configuration templates only — not official logos). Icons are fetched once from the same GitHub raw host and stored only in this browser. Cookies, tokens, and real usage numbers are never sent or included. Templates may break when sites redesign — use Re-teach if a read fails. You still need to log in and allow host access.
samples.errorFallback: Unable to import the starter pack.
samples.onboardingBody: Import a community starter pack, then log in and allow access. Teach only if a value breaks.
samples.added: Added {count} providers ({skipped} skipped). Next: log in and allow host access, then refresh.
samples.alreadyRegistered: Starter providers are already registered. Existing settings were not changed.
samples.nextSteps: Numbers are not guaranteed. If a tile fails, use Fix tracking / Re-teach.
samples.pasteHelp: Offline / share path. Paste a many-ai-usage.starter.v1 JSON object, then import. Nothing is sent outside this browser.
samples.replaceConfirm: {count} providers already exist. Overwrite their settings with the starter pack? (Your custom providers with other ids are kept.)
report.privacyNote: Do not include cookies, tokens, real usage numbers, page text, or account details. Auto-filled fields are extension version, browser kind, and each provider’s display name and status only. “Open on GitHub” copies to the clipboard first (Issue Forms often ignore body prefill).
report.titlePlaceholder: Example: Re-teach does not save the value
report.screenshotHint: Screenshots cannot be attached in this extension. After opening a GitHub Issue, paste or drag-and-drop a masked image there yourself.
report.validationRequired: Enter a title and what happened.
report.copyOk: Copied to the clipboard. Paste it into the Issue.
report.copyFail: Copy failed. Select the text below and copy it manually.
report.githubCopiedWithBody: Copied the report and opened GitHub. Paste into the Issue form fields if prefill is empty. {screenshotHint}
report.githubCopiedTitleOnly: The report is long, so only the title was opened. The body is on the clipboard — paste it into the Issue. {screenshotHint}
report.githubCopyFailWithBody: Copy failed. Manually copy the text below, then paste it into the opened Issue. {screenshotHint}
report.githubCopyFailTitleOnly: Copy failed and the report is long, so only the title was opened. Copy the text below and paste it into the Issue. {screenshotHint}
report.screenshotHintShort: Attach screenshots yourself on the Issue page (this extension cannot upload images).
reportBody.noteSecrets: - Do not paste cookies, tokens, account emails, raw HTML, or real usage numbers.
reportBody.noteScreenshots: - Screenshots: attach on the GitHub Issue yourself (paste or drag-and-drop). Mask personal data first. The extension cannot upload images.
options.hostAccessBody: Allow access to parse visible usage data in your browser session.
options.noMetrics: No normalized usage values yet. Open the registered page after allowing host access.
options.urlHelp: The page is read in your browser session. Cookies, tokens, and raw HTML are never stored or sent elsewhere.
options.customIconHelp: Optional. Upload your own image to replace the sample letter badge. Provider brand/favicon is never auto-loaded (trademark & privacy). Stored only in this browser.
options.teachHelp: Opens teach mode on the usage page. Click the big total (e.g.「使用済」), not a small legend chip, then Done and return.
options.brokenTrack: Broken track. Click「Fix tracking」above, open usage sheet, teach the big「使用済」total.
options.emptyPanel: Choose a provider, or add a new usage page.
options.msgNeedUrl: Enter an http(s) usage page URL.
options.msgSavedOk: Saved. Open the usage page to capture its local snapshot.
options.msgSavedNoPerm: Saved, but host access is still required.
options.msgTeachNeedAccess: Host access is required before teaching this page.
options.msgTeachPermDenied: Host access is required. Grant permission and try again.
options.msgTeachUnreachable: Could not attach teach mode. Open the usage page (e.g. grok.com/?_s=usage), wait for it to load, then try again.
options.msgTeachFailed: Unable to open teach mode. Check host access and that the usage page URL is correct.
options.msgTeachReady: Teaching tab is ready. Click the big total (e.g.「使用済」), not a small legend chip. Then Done and return.
options.msgTeachReadyReset: Teaching tab is ready. Choose the reset date or countdown, then select Done and return.
popup.emptyNoProviders: Import a starter pack, or add your own usage page.
popup.emptyOpenPage: Open a registered usage page to begin.
popup.permissionBody: Allow access to this usage page so the dashboard can read its visible data locally.
popup.reteachBody: The taught value was not found three times. Track the value again on the usage page.
popup.tileBody: No confident usage metric was found. Keep this page as a link tile, or try parsing again.
popup.openOnce: Open the page once to capture a local snapshot.
popup.fixTrackingTitle: Delete broken tracks and open teach mode for a clean total
popup.teachFailPerm: Host permission is required. Click Allow access, then Re-teach again.
popup.teachFailMissing: Provider was not found. Open Settings and check it is registered.
popup.teachFailUnreachable: Could not attach teach mode on the page. Open the usage page, then Re-teach again.
popup.teachFailTab: Could not open a browser tab for teaching.
popup.teachFailGeneric: Could not start teach mode. Open the usage page and try Re-teach again.
